message:
🐛 Fix cast overlap, preview overlay, sidebar tree, 24/7 EPG mapping (#52)

* �� Fix cast overlap, preview overlay, sidebar tree, 24/7 EPG mapping

- Move cast icon to far-right in player bottom bar (Spacer before cast)
- Remove ChannelInfoOverlay from video preview (info already in side panel)
- Provider tree: only change channel list when clicking sub-category or
  provider with no subcategories; just expand/collapse otherwise
- 24/7 channels: skip EPG mapping entirely (check name + groupTitle)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Shrink show backdrop, add dominant color page tint

- Reduce backdrop from 300px to 200px
- Extract dominant color from backdrop image using palette_generator
- Apply subtle 15% tint of dominant color to page background
- Gradient starts fading earlier (0.4 instead of 0.5)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Wire up settings, remove default player controls, cleanup toolbar

- Remove default media_kit play button from fullscreen player (NoVideoControls)
- Remove EPG Mappings and Guide toggle buttons from channel toolbar
- Wire up all settings: EPG Mappings → navigate, Auto-Refresh → interval picker,
  Buffer Size → size picker, Failover Mode → mode picker with descriptions,
  Web Remote → actual start/stop toggle with port info, Button Mapping → info dialog,
  Source Code → opens GitHub URL
- EPG sources: add enable/disable toggle switch per source
- Backup export: add 'Save As…' option with file picker
- Settings screen: ESC key navigates back (CallbackShortcuts)
- Show detail: bump backdrop to 240px (was 200px, from 300px)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
